data.name: 女冒險者聚集的情色旅館
data.detailed_description:
🏨 遊戲介紹 🏨

✨ 作為旅店老闆，打造最頂級的旅店吧！

💎 提升滿意度、吸引力和聲譽，增加客流量，擴展旅店設施！

🎲 在日常經營中，觸發大量隨機事件！每次遊玩都能保持新鮮感！

⚔️ 接受討伐魔物的委託，為旅店賺取資金！還能作為正宗戰鬥遊戲享受樂趣！

💕 與入住旅店的女冒險者們展開無數色色劇情 💕

👑 隨著旅店成長，各種女冒險者會前來入住！

🌟 與她們加深交流，一起討伐魔物，或者享受色色的時刻……

💗 可互動的女冒險者有11人！共53個H場景，每角色平均5個場景！CG超過160張，劇情容量約為前作《Dungeon Desire》的3倍！

💘 以純愛為主的H場景！本次特別注重角色差異化，根據每個角色的外貌和性格，精心準備了多樣化的H場景！

📋 遊戲規格及其他 📋

🎮 遊戲類型

旅店經營模擬RPG

💓 H場景內容

可互動女角色：11人

H場景：53個（160+ HCG）

語音：H場景帶語音

螢幕尺寸：1280x720

⏱️ 預計遊玩時間

10小時以上

🛠️ 便捷系統 🛠️

  • 🖼️ 插圖動態功能：

    H場景中加入動態效果，提升臨場感！

  • 📝 文本功能：

    支持文本跳躍、自動模式（可調速）、快速存檔/讀檔、日誌記錄、射精倒計時、劇情進度確認、窗口臨時隱藏等功能。

  • 🔄 事件回放模式：

    隨時重溫已觀看的H場景和CG，還能解鎖所有未觀看事件。

  • 👀 立繪欣賞模式：

    自由設置喜歡的角色立繪，包括表情、服裝、背景等，還能編輯文本顯示自定義對話！

  • 🤖 自動戰鬥模式：

    為嫌戰鬥麻煩或想節省時間的玩家，提供高性能AI自動戰鬥模式（可細調全體自動、部分自動、僅雜兵自動等）。

  • 🔱 最強裝備系統：

    可更改“最強裝備”標準（攻擊型、魔法攻擊型、防禦型），一鍵為全隊切換至最強裝備。

  • 🌈 作弊模式：

    為覺得戰鬥內容麻煩的玩家，提供魔物討伐委託自動完成等功能。

    另有專注於遊戲的“H場景自動跳過功能”和想立刻看到色色畫面的“H場景插圖跳過功能”。

  • ⚙️ 設置功能：

    支持戰鬥速度調整、遊戲手柄/按鍵設置、音效調節、窗口顏色、文本速度和字體等細節調整。

data.short_description: 作為旅店老闆，打造最頂級的旅店吧！與入住旅店的女冒險者們展開無數色色劇情！與她們加深交流，一起討伐魔物，或者享受色色的時刻……
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10/11
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 11
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: The Lustful Inn of Female Adventurers
data.detailed_description:
🏨 Introduction🏨

✨ As the owner, build the ultimate inn!

💎 Increase satisfaction, customer appeal, and reputation to attract more guests and expand your inn’s facilities!

🎲 Experience tons of random events in your daily management, keeping the gameplay fresh every time!

⚔️ Take on monster-hunting quests to earn funds for your inn! Enjoy it as a full-fledged battle game too!

💕 Countless naughty encounters with the female adventurers staying at your inn 💕

👑 As your inn grows, a variety of female adventurers will come to stay!

🌟 Deepen your bonds with them—go on monster hunts together or enjoy some steamy moments...

💗 11 female adventurers available for naughty scenes! 53 total H-scenes with 5 scenes per character on average! Over 160 CGs and a scenario volume about 3 times larger than the previous game Dungeon Desire!

💘 Pure love-focused H-scenes! This time, we’ve emphasized character differentiation, tailoring diverse H-scenes to each character’s appearance and personality!

📋 Game Specs & Details 📋

🎮 Game Genre

Inn Management Simulation RPG

💓 H-Scene Details

H-Compatible Female Characters: 11

H-Scenes: 53（160+ HCGs）

Voice: Voiced H-scenes

Screen Size: 1280x720

⏱️ Estimated Playtime

Over 10 hours

🛠️ Convenient Systems 🛠️

  • 🖼️ Illustration Motion Feature:

    Adds immersion to H-scenes with dynamic illustrations!

  • 📝 Text Features:

    Includes text skip, auto mode (adjustable speed), quick save/load, log history, ejaculation countdown, scenario progress tracker, and temporary window hiding.

  • 🔄 Event Replay Mode:

    Revisit viewed H-scenes and CGs anytime, with an option to unlock all unviewed events.

  • 👀 Character Portrait Viewing Mode:

    Customize and enjoy your favorite character’s portrait with options like expressions, outfits, and backgrounds. Edit text to display your preferred dialogue!

  • 🤖 Auto-Battle Mode:

    For players who find combat tedious or want to save time, a high-performance AI auto-battle system is included (with detailed settings like full auto, partial auto, or auto for weak enemies only).

  • 🔱 Ultimate Equipment System:

    Change the criteria for “ultimate equipment” (attack-focused, magic-focused, defense-focused) and switch your entire party’s gear to the best equipment with one button.

  • 🌈 Cheat Mode:

    For those who find battle content bothersome, features like auto-completing monster-hunting quests are available.

    Additionally, an “H-scene auto-skip function” for focused gameplay and an “H-scene illustration skip function” for instant access to steamy visuals are included.

  • ⚙️ Config Options:

    Fine-tune battle speed, gamepad/key bindings, sound settings, window colors, text speed, fonts, and more!

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 10/11
  • Processor: 3+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 11/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: 11
  • Processor: 3+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
